sub_modules.fp_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision operand unpacker. Extracts sign, effective exponent, 24-bit significand, and zero/INF/NaN flags.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Combinational special-value resolver for NaNs and infinities, including invalid infinity cancellation to quiet NaN.
sub_modules.fp_align: Combinational magnitude ordering and exponent alignment block. Produces guard/round/sticky-extended significands.
sub_modules.fp_significand_addsub: Combinational aligned significand add/subtract block based on effective operand signs.
sub_modules.fp_normalize: Combinational normalization block. Handles carry normalization, cancellation left-normalization, zero detection, and subnormal boundary behavior.
sub_modules.fp_round_pack: Combinational IEEE-754 round-to-nearest-even and pack block with overflow to infinity and subnormal packing.
